description: QuickBlox provides chat, messaging, video calling, content storage, push notifications, custom objects, and related communication features for web and mobile applications. Its platform includes SDKs and UI kits for client apps plus a server-side HTTP API for backend integration.
summary: QuickBlox exposes a documented REST Server API at https://api.quickblox.com, authenticated either by `QB-Token` session tokens or server-side `ApiKey` authorization; no public GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI surfaced in public docs.
